title: wolftpm-tss lib.rs quick-start example uses no_run,ignore — will silently bitrot
description: The quick-start code example in wolftpm-tss/src/lib.rs uses ```no_run,ignore, which means rustdoc never compiles or runs it. It will silently diverge from the real API. The correct approach is to gate the example on the tss feature: `#[cfg_attr(feature = "tss", doc = "...")]` or use a separate cfg_doc integration test, so it at least compiles when the feature is enabled.
